purpose: User-facing CMake build presets. Provides Visual Studio 2026 default/release, native Ninja debug/release/relwithdebinfo, clang debug/release, and mingw-release (WSL→Windows cross-compile). Each preset writes into build/${presetName}.
exports: buildPreset: debug / release / ninja-* / clang-* / mingw-release
invariants: binaryDir is always ${sourceDir}/build/${presetName} — README output-path examples and CI scripts depend on this layout.
Visual Studio presets pin generator 'Visual Studio 18 2026' to match the Windows SDK 10.0.26100 set in CMakeLists.txt.
gotchas: `default` and `release` presets require Visual Studio 18 2026 — they fail on Linux/macOS. Use ninja-* or clang-* on those platforms.
mingw-release requires x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc / -g++ on PATH; otherwise configure fails at compiler detection.
Single-config Ninja presets bake CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE at configure time; switching between Debug/Release means re-running cmake --preset, not just cmake --build with a different --config.
